title: Exclusive | Watch The Video | Best Views | Vacant.
description:
Betterhomes Real Estate is proud to present this beautiful one-bedroom apartment with stunning sea views in Botanica Tower, Dubai Marina.

Property Features:

High-floor unit
Unfurnished
Spacious balcony
Floor-to-ceiling windows
Kitchen appliances included
Spectacular sea and marina views
Modern interior finishes

Ideally positioned in the heart of Dubai Marina, Botanica Tower enjoys a prime waterfront location, offering breathtaking views of the Marina, the Arabian Gulf, and Palm Jumeirah. This luxury development combines premium living with a unique feature that truly sets it apart — a tropical sky garden occupying the entire 22nd floor, allowing residents to enjoy panoramic views of Dubai's iconic skyline.

Building Amenities:

Swimming pool
Jacuzzi
Children's pool
Fully equipped gymnasium
Steam room
Secure covered parking
24-hour security
Marina and sea views
Walking distance to the beach

Dubai Marina is one of Dubai's most vibrant waterfront communities, offering an exceptional lifestyle with a wide selection of restaurants, cafés, retail outlets, supermarkets, and renowned hotels right on your doorstep.

Residents also enjoy easy access to Dubai Marina Mall and Jumeirah Beach Residence (JBR), home to an array of dining, entertainment, and leisure options, as well as some of Dubai's most popular beaches.

Contact Betterhomes today to arrange a viewing.

title: 2 Bed Duplex | Vacant On Transfer | Negotiable
description:
Abbie and Betterhomes are proud to present this well-maintained 2-bedroom duplex in Hayat Boulevard, Town Square which offers a spacious layout and modern finishes within one of Dubai's most sought-after family communities.

Featuring an open-plan living and dining area, a contemporary kitchen, generously sized bedrooms with built-in wardrobes, and plenty of natural light throughout, this property is ideal for both end-users and investors.

Located within walking distance of Town Square Park, retail outlets, cafés, supermarkets, and community amenities, residents enjoy a vibrant lifestyle with excellent connectivity across Dubai.

-2 Bedroom 3 Bath Duplex

-Family-Friendly Community

As a dedicated Town Square specialist, I offer in-depth community knowledge, access to the latest opportunities, and expert guidance throughout the buying process. Contact me today to arrange a viewing on this in demand property!

title: Upgraded | Vacant | Partial Marina View

* Fully renovated & upgraded
* Vacant

* Nice Amenities including a tennis court

To arrange your viewing, contact Martin, our area specialist, today.

DEC Towers is a residential complex in Dubai Marina, consisting of two mid-rise towers offering a mix of studio, one-, two-, and three-bedroom apartments. Developed by Dheeraj & East Coast LLC, the project features spacious layouts, floor-to-ceiling windows, and balconies with Marina and city views. Residents enjoy amenities such as a swimming pool, gym, tennis court, and retail outlets on the ground floor. Positioned near Sheikh Zayed Road, DEC Towers offers convenient access to Marina Walk, JBR Beach, and public transport options, making it a sought-after choice for both investors and tenants.

Betterhomes

title: Exclusive | Ultra Luxury | Smart Home
description:
Welcome to a residence where innovation meets exceptional design. This truly one-of-a-kind 3-bedroom apartment with an additional private guest suite has been completely reimagined, setting a new benchmark for luxury living in Dubai.

At its core is a sculpted natural stone kitchen designed for direct cooking—eliminating the need for conventional stovetops. A bespoke 360-degree rotating ceiling-mounted TV, finished in matching stone, reflects the seamless design language throughout. Everyday features such as the sink, flush, and storage elements are discreetly integrated into stone surfaces, revealing themselves only when needed—creating a clean, minimalist aesthetic with cutting-edge functionality.

Located in the prestigious Tiara Aquamarine tower on Palm Jumeirah, the apartment has undergone a full high-end transformation. Ambient lighting, premium finishes, and carefully curated furnishings create a refined yet welcoming atmosphere. The former maid’s room has been converted into a stylish fourth bedroom with its own en-suite, ideal as a guest suite.

Floor-to-ceiling windows and a spacious balcony showcase breathtaking views of Atlantis, Royal Atlantis, the harbour, and the Arabian Gulf.

title: WATERFRONT PARADISE I 2BR FULL SEA VIEW
description:
The Dubai Marina is the most impressive Dubai district with a stunning skyline, luxurious residential buildings and first-of-its-kind classy leisure facilities. With a length of 4 kilometers, the Dubai Marina offers a unique blend of modern architecture and feel-good ambience.
Here you will find exclusive restaurants, cafes and shopping centres. Along the promenade you can stroll, jog or just relax.
The Stella Maris Tower is an impressive gem. The building is characterized by its
modern architecture, luxurious furnishings and first-class amenities. The exclusive residential atmosphere and the breath taking view of the marina and the sea, make every day unique.
The spacious floor plans, high ceilings and floor-to-ceiling windows that allow plenty of natural light
will convince you of our offer.
You will find a luxurious pool area, a modern fitness center,an extra ladies gym, a spa and a communal lounge. In addition, the building offers a 24-hour concierge and security service, as well as a spacious underground parking and even its own cinema!
In the immediate neighbourhood you will find first-class restaurants and the Marina Mall. Stroll along the waterfront and take advantage of a variety of leisure and entertainment options.
The connection to the metro is only a few minutes walk away.

With this apartment, we offer you a unique property on the 21st floor.
The view of the marina and the sea is breath taking. On a spacious living area of 1515 square feet you will find comfortable and stylish living ambience.
In the light-flooded, spacious living room with floor-to-ceiling windows, you will feel at home
from the very first minute. The open kitchen has modern built-in appliances and offers plenty of storage space. 
The apartment has two bedrooms, each with built-in wardrobes.
The master bedroom offers a balcony. Another highlight of the apartment is the large balcony from which you can enjoy spectacular sunsets.

Discovery Gardens is a perfect community for singles and families looking for an affordable, green, and pedestrian-friendly neighborhood in Dubai.
Situated close to Ibn Battuta Mall, the area provides a self-sufficient lifestyle with convenient access to supermarkets, petrol stations, restaurants, and laundry facilities.
Developed by Nakheel in 2009, Discovery Gardens is known for its lively low-rise apartment buildings and extensive green spaces, ideal for walking and outdoor activities.
Residents can also take advantage of community swimming pools and tennis courts. The neighborhood mainly attracts mid-income South Asian families and corporate professionals.
Nestled in vibrant Jebel Ali, Discovery Gardens offers seamless connectivity via Sheikh Zayed Road and E311, plus its own metro station. You’re just minutes from:
-Ibn Battuta Mall (5 min)
-Dubai Marina (10 min)
-Downtown Dubai (25 min)
